'''Xavier Va'a''' (born 17 November 2003) is a Samoan professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[York Knights]] in the [[Super League]].

He previously played for the [[Sydney Roosters]] in the [[NRL]].

==Career==
===Sydney Roosters===
In round 12 of the [[2025 NRL season]], Va'a made his first grade debut against the [[Cronulla Sharks]], scoring a try.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://7news.com.au/sport/rugby-league/sydney-roosters-youngster-de-la-salle-vaa-could-hardly-breathe-after-harrowing-lung-injury-c-18808076 |title=Sydney Roosters youngster De La Salle Va’a ‘could hardly breathe’ after harrowing lung injury|publisher=7News|date=25 May 2025}}</ref>

On 10 December 2025, the Roosters announced that Va'a was released from the remainder of his contract to pursue opportunities elsewhere.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2025-12-09 |title=Xavier Va’a granted immediate release |url=https://www.roosters.com.au/news/2025/12/10/xavier-vaa-granted-immediate-release/ |access-date=2025-12-10 |website=Sydney Roosters |language=en}}</ref>

===York Knights===
On 9 January 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[York Knights]] in the [[Super League]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=9 Jan 2026|author=Callum Walker|title=Sydney Roosters forward Xavier Va’a signs for York Knights|url=https://www.totalrl.com/sydney-roosters-forward-xavier-vaa-signs-for-york-knights/}}</ref>
